page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Manage your profile, account, and preferences

account.walletsHint: Required to earn XP and receive on-chain credentials
account.deleteDesc: Permanently remove your account and all associated data

course_updates.label: Course updates
course_updates.desc: New lessons, content changes, and course announcements

xp_rewards.label: XP & rewards
xp_rewards.desc: When you earn XP, level up, or unlock an achievement

streak_reminders.label: Streak reminders
streak_reminders.desc: Daily reminders to maintain your learning streak

leaderboard.label: Leaderboard changes
leaderboard.desc: When your rank changes or you enter the top 10

community.label: Community activity
community.desc: Replies, mentions, and new discussions in your courses

privacy.publicDesc: Anyone can view your profile, XP, and completed courses
privacy.privateDesc: Only you can see your profile and progress
privacy.dataExportDesc: Download a copy of your data including profile, course progress, XP history, and certificates.
